action.reasoning: Observation: sweep now runs and reveals older checkpoints fail because predict.py only supports cached-feature heads, while strong_v1-style checkpoints contain full CLIP finetune weights plus classifier layers. Analysis: with only 2 iterations left, the only plausible way to beat the current hidden score is checkpoint archaeology, not new training. We need predict.py to support both cached-feature linear heads and full-model CLIP finetune checkpoints, then rescore all checkpoints on val and submit the best unrecovered candidate immediately if it looks stronger than the plain linear probe. Decision: rewrite predict.py to infer checkpoint type, load either (a) cached-feature head on top of CLIP features or (b) full CLIP+MLP classifier from state_dict keys, run the sweep, and use the results to choose a final submission next iteration.
